title: Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple
description: Adds a crafting recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple!
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Requires Quilted Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

![Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf48e4075dd679e69dc41c4d50950d3f84b7ad00.png)

This mod/datapack adds back the removed enchanted golden apple recipe, making it craftable again.

## Recipe
![You can craft an enchanted golden apple by placing an apple in the center of the crafting grid and surrounding it with 8 gold blocks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9268ea2d5002fd17f31c9d54cbfe5c9002ea2b97.png)

Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).
